bone_spike.name: Bone Spike
bone_spike.description: Setup/Builder: Summon a spike of bone to impale the foe. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Soul Pip.

soul_shackles.name: Soul Shackles
soul_shackles.description: Setup: Bind the target's spirit to the ground. Applies [Sluggish] and generates 1 Soul Pip.

corpse_explosion.name: Corpse Explosion
corpse_explosion.description: Payoff/AOE: Detonate a fallen soul to deal massive Magic damage to all enemies. Consumes 5 Soul Pips.

deaths_embrace.name: Death's Embrace
deaths_embrace.description: Payoff: Embrace the target with necrotic force. Consumes 3 Soul Pips to deal damage and heal the caster.

bone_shield.name: Bone Shield
bone_shield.description: Defense: Surround yourself with a cage of rib bones. Reduces all Physical damage by 40% for 6 ticks.

rotting_touch.name: Rotting Touch
rotting_touch.description: Defense/Debuff: Cause the foe's flesh to decay. Reduces target's attack speed and damage by 30%.

nether_grip.name: Nether Grip
nether_grip.description: Mobility: Teleport to a targeted location using void portals.

raise_dead.name: Raise Dead
raise_dead.description: Utility/Signature: Summon a skeletal servant to fight for you for 30 seconds.

necromancer_physiology.name: Necromancer Physiology
necromancer_physiology.description: Passive: Decay Master. You gain 10% Magic power for every Soul Pip currently held and you are immune to [Bleeding] effects.
